results.title: WordPress Coach – Support for specific Web Design Customizations
results.description:
As part of the further development of our website, we are looking for an experienced WordPress mentor to support us with several specific customizations and technical challenges. 
Collaboration is to take place via video chat and shared screen to ensure direct and efficient editing. 

Independent Editing: The goal of the coaching is to expand our basic Wordpress knowledge further, to enable us to independently handle our own future minor adjustments and modifications on our website.

Here is an example page from us:https://www.certification-india.com/

Description of tasks (among others):

1.	Orientation in the theme code: Support for the general navigation and structure of our own theme.
2.	Footer customization: Enabling targeted changes to the footer section of the website.
3.	Slider Block: Adjust the speed of an existing slider block.
4.	Justification: Activation of justification for a specific type of post.
5.	Main navigation: Reproduction of a pop-up text box for the main navigation (a similar function already exists in certain sections of the page).
6.	Integration of an external chatbot (priority-high): Assistance in embedding a chatbot, especially in solving current problems with the permission procedure and inserting it into the theme code.

results.title: Freelance Webflow Developer – Pixel-Perfect Figma Integration (Client-First Methodology)
results.description:
We need an experienced Freelance Webflow Developer who specializes in converting pixel-perfect Figma designs into fully responsive Webflow templates and static pages. The ideal candidate should follow the Client-First methodology, ensuring best practices in class naming, global styles, and CMS structure.

Key Responsibilities:
- Convert approved Figma designs into Webflow pages with precision.
- Implement global typography, color palettes, and UI components following Client-First standards.
- Manage Webflow CMS collections for dynamic content such as blog posts and portfolios.
- Ensure seamless functionality, form submissions, and third-party integrations (e.g., Calendly, reCAPTCHA).
- Optimize and test for cross-browser compatibility and responsiveness across devices.
- Perform final design QA and branding review before project handoff.
- Required Skills & Experience:
- Proven Webflow experience with a portfolio of pixel-perfect - Figma-to-Webflow projects.
- Strong understanding of Client-First methodology and Webflow best practices.
- Experience with Webflow CMS, global styles, and utility classes.
- Familiarity with component libraries like Relume is a plus.
- Ability to work independently, meet deadlines, and communicate effectively.


How to Apply:
Provide a brief cover letter outlining your experience.
Share links to previous Webflow projects, especially those following Client-First methodology.
Mention your availability and freelance rates.
This role is project-based and ideal for detail-oriented Webflow developers passionate about delivering high-quality, responsive web experiences.

results.title: iOS Developer Needed for UI/UX design of App using UIKit and Storyboards
results.description: Knowledge of UIKit Framework using Storyboards also have strong background in Swift and Objective-C.

results.title: Elementor Woocomerce changes today
results.description:
I have a woocommerce site, with pages built in Elementor. I need the following changes made to the site ASAP. Within the next 2 hours would be preferred. 

1. Payment page
- change "Phone" to "Phone number for tracking"
- change the payment conditions text and remove tickbox.
- Remove the coupon message from the top of the page and add to bottom and reduce to "Add a coupon"
- Add "All transactions are secure and encrypted." message to top of page below "Billing details"
- Remove infill colour from upsell box. Add outline line.
- Add 3 logos (SSL encryption and GDPR compliant, Stripe) and text to checkout pages. 
- Change Place Order button colour to blue (same colour of site)
- Change Place Order text to "Pay"

2. Remove legal disclaimer from the footer of the website when the user is in checkout process or on pricing page. It should be visible on all other pages.

results.title: Squarespace Developer for LinkedIn Sign-Up Integration & CRM Automation
results.description:
I am looking for a Squarespace developer to refine my LinkedIn sign-up integration for a seamless, automated onboarding experience.

Currently, when users sign up via LinkedIn, they are redirected to my Calendly booking page, but their information (full name, email, LinkedIn profile) is not being captured in HubSpot as intended. The transition needs to be smooth and professional, not feel like a spoof site.

You will ensure this integration is further developed, improve user flow, and ensure all data is captured correctly in HubSpot to build my CRM.

Work & Requirements:

✅ Ensure a seamless LinkedIn login experience—the process should feel smooth, professional, and not redirect users abruptly.
✅ Fix LinkedIn-to-HubSpot data sync—ensure user details (full name, email, LinkedIn profile) are automatically pushed to HubSpot.
✅ Refine the user journey—after sign-in, direct users to a clear confirmation or onboarding page before sending them to Calendly.
✅ Ensure all automations work correctly—HubSpot should be properly integrated with Squarespace and Calendly for a frictionless process.
✅ Prioritize user experience & security—the system should feel intuitive, polished, and reliable.

What to Include in Your Proposal:

📌 Your plan of action – A step-by-step breakdown of how you will complete the integration and fix the broken workflows.
📌 Estimated timeline – How long will it take to develop, test, and launch?
📌 Tools & integrations required – Will there be third-party services, APIs, or additional costs?
📌 Previous experience – Share examples of similar Squarespace or API integration projects.

I am streamlining my business automation, onboarding, and CRM workflows—so I need a go-to developer for future projects. If this project goes well, there will be ongoing work to refine and expand integrations.

If you specialize in creating seamless, automated user experiences with Squarespace and LinkedIn API, I want to hear from you!
